Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob only) confirms the pack-level posture is supported and not overclaimed.

Verified consistent across all layers: deliverable distribution {implementation:16, hermes_evidence:20, claude_review:2, test:2} and micro-title/micro-phase counts match exactly across the baseline prompt, registry (ANALYTICS_CORE_CP474_REQUIREMENTS / PACK_BINDING), service generators, validators, contract projection (cp474_requirements + p08_workflow_permission_slice_descriptor), closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, and scripts/validate-rp15-analytics-core-contract.mjs (which performs deepEqual contract<->code plus coverage/slice assertions). Sequencing is contiguous: upstream CP00-473 (last unit RP15.P08.M03.S21) -> CP00-474 first unit RP15.P08.M03.S22 -> next CP00-475 at RP15.P08.M05.S20.

production_ready claim supported: manifest and command-evidence report production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor, status implemented_pending_review. There is no production_ready=true overclaim; the Hermes production_ready_candidate:true is correctly a candidate gated behind Claude review + post-review commands + human approval. no_real_data:true and writes_product_state:false are asserted. freezeCp474Result and freezeCp474Validation stamp the no-write attestation (no runtime dispatch, no state/audit writes, no object storage, no real fixtures, no leaks), and the slice validator enforces descriptor_only:true / runtime_execution:false / customer_safe_errors_only:true / raw_payload_included:false on every row.

Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, allowed_claude_tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob - enforced in registry, descriptor, tests (model.test.js CP00-474 cases), and the validator script. Hermes control-plane patterns appear only as deterministic descriptor evidence packets/receipts (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, receipt_shape descriptor_only..._no_write), not product runtime.

CP178+ review-hardening evidence is valid: forbidden_review_evidence enumerates failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, and missing required-field markers; the readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1228-byte valid-JSON stdout, 0-byte stderr); prompt.txt is 2225 bytes with no embedded full diff/source. raw-output.json and review-receipt.json are correctly absent (produced post-review per the hardened sequence). Unrelated dirty/untracked files (the v2.0 docx, workbook/* artifacts, new-session-handoff.md, and the LDIP claude-review-results invalid-attempt JSON) are correctly classified out of pack scope; active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty.

No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
